name: Apricot-White Chocolate Cake Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup evaporated skim milk or 1/2 cup milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Grease 12 muffin cups.
3. Boil sugar, water, and cinnamon stick until the sugar dissolves completely. Add apricots and poach until tender (about 3-5 minutes). Remove from heat, leaving behind at least 1/4 cup of the liquid if using evaporated milk.
4. In a large bowl, mix together flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, nutmeg, and cinnamon.
5. In a small bowl, whisk together milk (and reserved poaching liquid if using evaporated milk), melted butter, egg, and vanilla extract.
6. Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients in as few strokes as possible. Fold in chopped apricots and white chocolate.
7. Fill each muffin cup about 1/2 to 3/4 full with batter.
8. Bake until golden brown, approximately 15-20 minutes.
This recipe can be adapted with various additions such as peach and nut, ginger-pear-walnut, banana-nut, cranberry-nut, date-nut, or pina colada.
